chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1966 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 17820/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 21.12.2016. Mr. Qadir Bux Ghirano, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G alongwith SIP Shoukat Ali, SHO P.S Bulri Shah Karim. -.-.-. Today, SHO P.S Bulri Shah Karim is present and undertakes that if petitioner approaches him with a complaint, he will act strictly in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of in view of above undertaking and with the directions that police officials/respondents will ensure that respondents do not cause any harassment to the petitioner in any manner whatsoever and if the petitioner approaches the police officials/respondents for protection, the same be provided strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
